context: A confident man crosses a dim city alley while the lamps and tall buildings create a dramatic mood.

actions.description: Man appears at the far end of the alley and walks toward the warm lamp glow.
He passes beneath a street lamp, backpack shifting slightly as his silhouette lengthens on the cobblestones.
He continues forward with steady confidence while shadows ripple across the walls.
